CVE-2024-34402.title: An issue was discovered in uriparser through 0.9.7. ComposeQueryE ...
CVE-2024-34402.description: An issue was discovered in uriparser through 0.9.7. ComposeQueryEngine in UriQuery.c has an integer overflow via long keys or values, with a resultant buffer overflow.

CVE-2024-34403.title: An issue was discovered in uriparser through 0.9.7. ComposeQueryM ...
CVE-2024-34403.description: An issue was discovered in uriparser through 0.9.7. ComposeQueryMallocExMm in UriQuery.c has an integer overflow via a long string.

CVE-2025-67899.title: uriparser through 0.9.9 allows unbounded recursion and stack cons ...
CVE-2025-67899.description: uriparser through 0.9.9 allows unbounded recursion and stack consumption, as demonstrated by ParseMustBeSegmentNzNc with large input containing many commas.
